title: Sticky Sewers
lines: The tunnels here are coated in a translucent, foul-smelling slime that seems to glow ever so slightly.
The air is thick and damp, and every drip of water echoes like a gunshot. You feel a rhythmic vibration under your boots.
There's a strange, pulsating light coming from the far end of the pipe.

options.desc: 1. Touch the glowing residue on the wall
